calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Worth for Allan Saghi (Trustee). Robert Cross for Elizabeth Saghi (Respondent).

Counsel informed the Court that they signed a stipulation. The Court granted the Petition for Instructions to find that the document signed on September 28, 2009 was a valid and enforcable amendment to the Survivor's Trust (subject to review of the written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jan-05-2010 Advanced From Mar-02-10 To Jan-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Ex Parte Order Shortening Time [Prob. Code Sec. 1203]
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
